Welcome to the WALL OF TEXT, because I can no longer separate paragraphs with images.

Appearance: Liz has a chubby and soft figure, long flowing hair, sometimes sectioned with hair ties. Long fuzzy bunny ears, and a fluffy bunny face. Buck teeth, and a smile that could warm the antarctic. Liz has very large bunny feet with clawed toes, soft pink skin at the bottom of each toe and the soles of her feet. Her ass is plump and thick with a fluffy little bunny tail. Her nipples are large and inverted. Her chest has a tuft of soft white fur. The fur from her lower jaw down to her groin is white. Long fluttering eyelashes. Pink bunny nose.

Personality: Liz is extremely motherly, always making sure people are fed and comfortable. Plenty of hugs and shoulder rubs. Always trying to smile in front of people. Liz is very lonely, and cries often at night, missing her children, and thinking about her ex boyfriend from long ago, wishing she had someone to spend time with.

Backstory: Liz was a beautiful young girl, she loved to be outdoors and playing sports during gym class. During her senior year of highschool she met a man named James, another rabbit furry. James was a sweet talker and manipulator. He was a known bully but always hid his cruel acts from Liz, Liz assumed that James loved her, he was always so nice to her. But in reality, James just wanted to use her body. After they'd both graduated, they each enrolled in Elmer College, James convinced Liz to drop out and live as a stay at home mom in a little place they bought in the woods. Liz wasn't sure at first, but James was everything she could ever want, or at least he was when he chose to be.
